result.stdout:
Description:
  Docify - AI-Powered XML Documentation Generator for .NET

Usage:
  Docify.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  analyze <project-path>   Analyze a .NET project or solution for documentation coverage
  generate <project-path>  Generate XML documentation for undocumented APIs
  config                   Manage Docify configuration (providers, models, API keys)
  restore <backup-path>    Restore files from a Docify backup

commands.payload:
Description:
  Docify - AI-Powered XML Documentation Generator for .NET

Usage:
  Docify.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  analyze <project-path>   Analyze a .NET project or solution for documentation coverage
  generate <project-path>  Generate XML documentation for undocumented APIs
  config                   Manage Docify configuration (providers, models, API keys)
  restore <backup-path>    Restore files from a Docify backup

result.stdout:
Description:
  Analyze a .NET project or solution for documentation coverage

Usage:
  Docify.CLI analyze <project-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <project-path>  Path to .csproj or .sln file to analyze

Options:
  --format <format>        Output format (text, json, markdown) [default: text]
  --include-context        Include LLM-collected context in the report [default: False]
  --file-path <file-path>  Path to save the report file (if not specified, output to console)
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Analyze a .NET project or solution for documentation coverage

Usage:
  Docify.CLI analyze <project-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <project-path>  Path to .csproj or .sln file to analyze

Options:
  --format <format>        Output format (text, json, markdown) [default: text]
  --include-context        Include LLM-collected context in the report [default: False]
  --file-path <file-path>  Path to save the report file (if not specified, output to console)
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage Docify configuration (providers, models, API keys)

Usage:
  Docify.CLI config [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  set-provider <provider>  Set the primary LLM provider
  set-fallback <provider>  Set the fallback LLM provider
  set-api-key <provider>   Set API key for a provider (secure input)
  show                     Display current configuration (masks API keys)

commands.payload:

  set-fallback <provider>  Set the fallback LLM provider
  set-api-key <provider>   Set API key for a provider (secure input)
  show                     Display current configuration (masks API keys)

  <provider>  Provider name (anthropic, openai)

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate XML documentation for undocumented APIs

Usage:
  Docify.CLI generate <project-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <project-path>  Path to .csproj or .sln file to analyze

Options:
  --intensity <intensity>      Filter which APIs to document (undocumented, partially_documented, all) [default: undocumented]
  --dry-run                    Preview changes without writing to files [default: False]
  --parallelism <parallelism>  Number of concurrent API requests (1-10, default: 3) [default: 3]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate XML documentation for undocumented APIs

Usage:
  Docify.CLI generate <project-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <project-path>  Path to .csproj or .sln file to analyze

Options:
  --intensity <intensity>      Filter which APIs to document (undocumented, partially_documented, all) [default: undocumented]
  --dry-run                    Preview changes without writing to files [default: False]
  --parallelism <parallelism>  Number of concurrent API requests (1-10, default: 3) [default: 3]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Restore files from a Docify backup

Usage:
  Docify.CLI restore <backup-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <backup-path>  Path to the backup directory to restore from

Options:
  --project-path <project-path>  Path to the project root (defaults to current directory) [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-docify.cli-0.1.3-alpha-4ef34ca99a0a437c964484ff253aa44a]
  --yes                          Skip confirmation prompt [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Restore files from a Docify backup

Usage:
  Docify.CLI restore <backup-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <backup-path>  Path to the backup directory to restore from

Options:
  --project-path <project-path>  Path to the project root (defaults to current directory) [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-docify.cli-0.1.3-alpha-4ef34ca99a0a437c964484ff253aa44a]
  --yes                          Skip confirmation prompt [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
